figure_purpose: Compare source data to backbone to mode1 reconstruction and residual-after with honest support mask
allowed_use: Manual QA of data to model decomposition flow
forbidden_use: Publication claim figure or quantitative endpoint evidence without table provenance
notes: Light gray marks unsupported cells outside finite aligned support and is annotated as not zero.

figure_purpose: Same-scale residual before vs after mode1 to inspect magnitude reduction
allowed_use: Manual QA of true reduction magnitude under equal scale
forbidden_use: Using this diagnostic as manuscript-ready residual panel
notes: Shared symmetric scale is fixed by max absolute residual-before value; unsupported cells remain gray.

figure_purpose: Zoomed residual-after structure with explicit unsupported mask
allowed_use: Manual QA of remaining structured residual where mode1 is defined
forbidden_use: Interpreting unsupported gray area as low residual or successful fit
notes: Uses tighter symmetric limits for residual-after only and text annotation for unsupported mask semantics.

figure_purpose: Inspect Phi1 finite support points and kappa1 versus temperature with caution markers
allowed_use: Manual QA of rank-1 mode shape/amplitude trends
forbidden_use: Publication-mode phi/kappa claims without broader program gate closure
notes: Phi1 markers indicate finite support points and note says line is connector only; kappa panel marks 22-24 K and 30 K caution.

figure_purpose: Per-T RMSE and improvement factor plus mean absolute residual trends
allowed_use: Manual QA of temperature heterogeneity and improvement distribution
notes: Includes RMSE_backbone divided by RMSE_after_mode1 and marks 30 K boundary caution.
